issue.author: shao-hua-li

comments.author: shao-hua-li

issue.title: [LSR] Wrong code at -O1 on x86_64_gnu_linux

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"
target triple = "x86_64-apple-macos"

define i64 @test_pr62660() {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %conv1 = and i32 %iv, 65535
  %add = add nsw i32 %iv, -1
  %sub = add i32 %add, %conv1
  %cmp = icmp sgt i32 %sub, 8
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i32 %iv, 1
  br i1 %cmp, label %loop, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %conv5 = zext i32 %iv to i64
  ret i64 %conv5
}

target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128-ni:1"

define void @foo() {
bb:
  br label %bb4

bb1:                                              ; preds = %bb13
  %t = shl i64 %t14, 32
  %t2 = add i64 %t, 1
  %t3 = ashr i64 %t2, 32
  ret void

bb4:                                              ; preds = %bb13, %bb
  %t5 = phi i64 [ 2, %bb ], [ %t14, %bb13 ]
  %t6 = add i64 %t5, 4
  %t7 = trunc i64 %t6 to i16
  %t8 = urem i16 %t7, 3
  %t9 = mul i16 %t8, 2
  %t10 = icmp eq i16 %t9, 1
  br i1 %t10, label %bb11, label %bb13

bb11:                                             ; preds = %bb4
  %t12 = udiv i16 1, %t7
  unreachable

bb13:                                             ; preds = %bb4
  %t14 = add nuw nsw i64 %t5, 6
  br i1 undef, label %bb1, label %bb4
}
